title: Make a Dye Out Of It
description: Changes how Minecraft's dye crafting mechanic works a little bit and adds several new recipes for making dyes.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Y7KK0m0s?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Datapack Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1052386?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Mod Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1381930?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Mod%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/Y7KK0m0s?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About Datapack / Mod **Make a Dye Out Of It (MaDOOI)** changes how Minecraft's dye crafting works. It **modifies** some recipes, making them more universal, **deletes** the ones that are not necessary and **adds** a bunch of new ones giving you more ways to craft **dyes** and **glow ink sacs**. ## Recipes This datapack / mod modifies, deletes, and adds a lot of recipes. Gives the opportunity to craft dyes in new ways and also to craft glow ink sacs. ![Crafting recipe for glow ink sac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b752f4116dae8d1c9c3b7ce4fdadc9cf639ed2ef.gif) ## Advancements MaDOOI adds in total **17** advancements you can gain. **16** for crafting each dye color, and **1 hidden challenge** you'll need to find by yourself, or read about it in the documentation. ![Minecraft advancement called "Orange is the New Dye"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c19495779c2daeace3f05575950ea148f44d7fc.png) ## Future datapack / mod support I plan on updating this datapack / mod once new **full** releases of Minecraft comes out. ## Compatibility with other mods If you want some extra compatibility for items or dyes introduced with **other mods**, let me know on [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF) and I will release additional add-ons giving compatibility with desired projects! ## Check out my other projects on my [profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Syhmac)!
